case_title: RATNAPALA, JOAN BARBARA MRS. VS KURTZBARD, PHYLIS MRS. DBA A & M CARPETS COMPANY

docket_entries.description: DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT KURTZBARD, PHYLIS MRS. DBA A & M CARPETS COMPANY

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RATNAPALA, JOAN BARBARA MRS. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KURTZBARD, PHYLIS MRS. DBA A & M CARPETS COMPANY $4,050.00 PRINCIPAL, $32.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,082.00, DEFENDANT WAIVES DEFECTIVE CERTIFIED MAIL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
PLTF'S EXHIBIT ALREADY RETURNED. INSIST THAT SOME OF THE DEFT'S EXHIBIT BELONG TO HER. EXHIBIT GIVEN TO COMMISSIONER FOR CLARIFICATION.
CERT MAIL SENT TO MRS PHYLIS KURTZBARD OWNER/MGR DBA A&M CARPET COMPANY RETURNED SIGNED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY RATNAPALA, JOAN BARBARA MRS. AS TO DEFENDANT KURTZBARD, PHYLIS MRS. DBA A & M CARPETS COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-28-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT GRANTED AS TO DEFENDANT KURTZBARD, PHYLIS MRS. DBA A & M CARPETS COMPANY
